title: Broiled Fluffy Flower Salad
description: A floral and fluffy American dish featuring Thai chili jam for a unique twist on a classic salad. Perfect for weeknight meals.
instructions: Slice the lettuce into thin strips.
Chop the tomato, red onion, and avocado into small pieces.
Combine the thai chili jam with lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper in a mixing bowl.
Place a large baking sheet under a broiler or grill pan to preheat. If using a broiler, ensure it is set to 'Broil'.
Add a layer of lettuce strips on the baking sheet first, followed by tomato, avocado, and red onion pieces.
Pour half of the thai chili sauce mixture over the layers evenly. Let them sit for about 5 minutes or until the lettuce begins to wilt slightly.
Sprinkle salt and pepper over the layers and drizzle remaining sauce over everything.
Place under preheated broiler (or grill pan) and cook for about 4-6 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and crispy.
Carefully transfer the salad from the baking sheet to a plate and serve immediately.
